promotions.headline: SammyC's Skool is Live
promotions.short_detail: Research modules, vendor intel & direct access to Sam.
promotions.full_detail: SammyC's Skool community is now live. Get direct access to Sam, research peptide modules, vendor intel, and community discussion.

promotions.headline: 40% off sitewide, stacks with SAMMYC
promotions.short_detail: Code SAMMYC adds another 15%, plus free 10ml BAC water on orders $100+
promotions.full_detail: Flawless Compounds is running 40% off sitewide, stackable with the SAMMYC code for an additional 15%. Every qualifying order of $100 or more receives a free 10ml BAC water automatically while supplies last. Confirm final eligibility and stacking details directly on the vendor website.
